title: Aggregates returning string crash
poc: CREATE FUNCTION pm_test(s STRING) RETURNS STRING EXTERNAL NAME udf.pm_test;
CREATE FUNCTION my_test2(s STRING) RETURNS STRING EXTERNAL NAME udf.my_test2;
key_bug_features: Aggregates returning string with invalid input types
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name STRING, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (2, NULL, 20.0);
SELECT pm_test(name) FROM test_table WHERE value > 15.0;
